content:
KUALA LUMPUR, September 24, 2025 — GatherStar, a global programmatic advertising platform that connects advertisers and publishers to drive unlimited growth, recently took part in the Global Traffic Connection Summit 2025, held in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

At the event, GatherStar’s team interacted with industry players, forging new connections and exploring collaborative prospects. This involvement highlights GatherStar’s dedication to broadening its influence in the global programmatic advertising ecosystem.

Specializing in programmatic advertising solutions, GatherStar leverages AI-driven technology and strategic insights to help businesses connect with target audiences more efficiently. In doing so, it drives growth, boosts brand visibility across various markets, and maximizes return on investment (ROI) for advertisers.

Participating in such a crucial industry gathering enables GatherStar to stay abreast of industry trends, network with peers, and showcase its capabilities to a wider audience—further cementing its status as an emerging leader in the programmatic advertising landscape.



About GatherStar

GatherStar is a global programmatic advertising platform that links advertisers and publishers to drive unlimited growth. We excel in the gaming, finance, and dating verticals. Committed to quality, GatherStar exclusively partners with verified traffic sources. Our top target regions include Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Russia, and Latin America.
